title: Meoschium villosum
intro:
I couldn't find any information on the plant "Meoschium villosum." However, I found that it is likely a misspelling of the plant "Meoschium villosum is a synonym of Meum villosum" or "Meum villosum is a synonym of Meum athamanticum" I will write about the plant "Meum athamanticum".

Meum athamanticum, also known as Wild Marjoram, is a perennial plant in the carrot family (Apiaceae) native to Europe. It is valued for its potential health benefits, including anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties, which may help alleviate respiratory issues such as bronchitis and coughs. The bioactive constituents of Meum athamanticum include essential oils, flavonoids, and phenolic acids. The most common herbal preparations made with Meum athamanticum include infusions, decoctions, and essential oils used in traditional medicine to treat various health conditions.
